# OData Asset Check

Smoke-test an OData service URL + entity set. Attaches as an `AssetCheckResult` to a Dagster asset; fails the check (with configurable severity) if:

- The service URL is unreachable or returns HTTP ≥ 400
- Fewer than `min_rows` (default 1) match the optional `$filter`
- More than `max_rows` match (if set)
- The first returned row is missing any of `expect_columns`

Useful for catching tenant misconfig, schema drift, or auth failures BEFORE the dependent pipeline runs.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_key` | `str` | Asset key to attach this check to |
| `service_url` | `str` | Base OData service URL |
| `entity_set` | `str` | Entity collection to probe |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `max_rows` | `int` | — | Optional — fail if more than this many rows match. |
| `timeout_seconds` | `int` | `60` | — |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `filter` | `str` | — | `$filter` predicate (applied to the count query). |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `check_name` | `str` | — | Check name. Defaults to 'odata_reachable_<entity_set>'. |
| `odata_version` | `str` | `"v2"` | 'v2' or 'v4' |
| `min_rows` | `int` | `1` | Fail if fewer than this many rows match. |
| `expect_columns` | `list[str]` | — | If set, the response's first row must contain all these columns; otherwise WARN/FAIL. |
| `auth_type` | `str` | `"basic"` | 'basic' \| 'bearer' \| 'none' |
| `auth_username_env_var` | `str` | — | — |
| `auth_password_env_var` | `str` | — | — |
| `auth_token_env_var` | `str` | — | — |
| `extra_headers` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | — |
| `verify_ssl` | `bool` | `true` | — |
| `severity` | `str` | `"ERROR"` | 'ERROR' (default) or 'WARN' on failure |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->
